changeSet.author: hdim-platform-team
changeSet.comment: Performance Optimization: GIN Indexes for JSONB Columns and additional B-tree indexes for common queries
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_config_tools_gin ON agent_configurations USING GIN (tool_configuration jsonb_path_ops)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_config_guardrails_gin ON agent_configurations USING GIN (guardrail_configuration jsonb_path_ops)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_config_ui_gin ON agent_configurations USING GIN (ui_configuration jsonb_path_ops)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_version_snapshot_gin ON agent_versions USING GIN (configuration_snapshot jsonb_path_ops)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prompt_template_variables_gin ON prompt_templates USING GIN (variables jsonb_path_ops)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_test_session_messages_gin ON agent_test_sessions USING GIN (messages jsonb_path_ops)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_test_session_metrics_gin ON agent_test_sessions USING GIN (metrics jsonb_path_ops)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tool_def_schema_gin ON tool_definitions USING GIN (input_schema jsonb_path_ops)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_config_tenant_name ON agent_configurations (tenant_id, LOWER(name))
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_version_status_created ON agent_versions (agent_configuration_id, status, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_version_latest ON agent_versions (agent_configuration_id, created_at DESC) INCLUDE (version_number, status)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prompt_template_system ON prompt_templates (is_system) WHERE is_system = TRUE
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_test_session_tenant_time ON agent_test_sessions (tenant_id, started_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_analytics_tenant_date_range ON agent_usage_analytics (tenant_id, analytics_date DESC)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_config_active_only ON agent_configurations (tenant_id, name) WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_config_draft_only ON agent_configurations (tenant_id, updated_at DESC) WHERE status = 'DRAFT'
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_version_published_only ON agent_versions (agent_configuration_id, published_at DESC) WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED'
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_config_name_lower ON agent_configurations (tenant_id, LOWER(name) varchar_pattern_ops)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_config_desc_lower ON agent_configurations (tenant_id, LOWER(description) varchar_pattern_ops)
